I was so excited to get my starter after: I was so excited to get my starter after Eileen was at the town square, b-but...
This house is so big! And it's scary! It: This house is so big! And it's scary! It looks like it could be a haunted house if you visited it at night! I don't want to go inside anymore!
What if there's a monster living in it?!: What if there's a monster living in it?!
What lustrous architecture and detail! A: What lustrous architecture and detail! And the garden is absolutely magnificent!
You really wouldn't guess at a first gla: You really wouldn't guess at a first glance that this is the professor's laboratory, would you?
Hello, new trainer! Welcome to Lillica T: Hello, new trainer! Welcome to Lillica Town's Pokémon mansi-- err, laboratory.
In the middle, you will find the entranc: In the middle, you will find the entrance to the grand hall, where you will be received to get your starter Pokémon.
The set of doors on the right leads to t: The set of doors on the right leads to the trainer school, and the set of doors on the left is the residential area.
The laboratory opens its doors to the pu: The laboratory opens its doors to the public only a few times per year, at the start of a new season of the Ivere League.
I'm from here, so this place isn't anyth: I'm from here, so this place isn't anything new to me, but no matter how many times I see the place up close it remains impressive.
I had to come here from all the way up n: I had to come here from all the way up north, and it technically would've been easier for me to go there for my starter, but...
Despite there being a lab in the north a: Despite there being a lab in the north as well, this laboratory in the south is the only one that offers choices from all Pokémon types.
I couldn't get a Bug-type starter over i: I couldn't get a Bug-type starter over in the north! The starters offered here are more rare, too.
Now I'm just taking a short break before: Now I'm just taking a short break before heading to Celandine City.
LAUREL: It's always busy each league sea: LAUREL: It's always busy each league season, but this year is looking like it's exceptionally so.
It's looking like they're trying to fit: It's looking like they're trying to fit in more people in the league schedule so they can shorten the queue time.
It <i>is</i> a bit of a hassle to obtain: It is a bit of a hassle to obtain this many starter Pokémon, but it's a fulfilling job!
So far, we've yet to have a season where: So far, we've yet to have a season where we ran out, so here's to hoping we'll be able to make everyone happy this year too.
EILEEN: Quite so! I was in Lillica town: EILEEN: Quite so! I was in Lillica town earlier, and it seemed like the town was already bustling with life.
Despite your presence here, the laborato: Despite your presence here, the laboratory isn't left unmanned, correct?
LAUREL: Correct! Not only are the manor: LAUREL: Correct! Not only are the manor staff present, but there's also someone currently working on handing people their starters.
Until I return, the place is left in goo: Until I return, the place is left in good hands.
EILEEN: Wonderful to hear! I for one can: EILEEN: Wonderful to hear! I for one cannot wait to see what talent will jump out from the crowd this year.
EILEEN: Quite so! I was in Lillica Town: EILEEN: Quite so! I was in Lillica Town earlier, and it seemed like the town was already bustling with life.
???: Come onnn, Saber! Are you still gro: ???: Come onnn, Saber! Are you still groggy from oversleeping or something?
We gotta hurry it up! Today's the big da: We gotta hurry it up! Today's the big day!
???: What's the matter, man? This isn't: ???: What's the matter, man? This isn't like you at all.
You fell asleep nearly the second we sat: You fell asleep nearly the second we sat down in the train!
SABER: Urgh... Could you cut me some sla: SABER: Urgh... Could you cut me some slack, Wynn? I told you that I didn't sleep very well.
Y'know,\\| because of <i>the nightmare</: Y'know,\| because of the nightmare I told you about.
WYNN: Pshaw, at least it was just a drea: WYNN: Pshaw, at least it was just a dream! Are you really that intent on letting it ruin your mood?
SABER: No, but that doesn't make me any: SABER: No, but that doesn't make me any less tired.
WYNN: Oh come on! Chin up, Saber! This i: WYNN: Oh come on! Chin up, Saber! This is a day to celebrate!
We're finally getting our starters and t: We're finally getting our starters and taking on the league after a five year wait!
There's no time to be moping around! The: There's no time to be moping around! The laboratory should be right up ahead.
Normally it's obscured by the trees from: Normally it's obscured by the trees from down here, but now we finally get to see the place for ourselves!
SABER: Come to think of it, I've never a: SABER: Come to think of it, I've never actually seen the place in person. I've been in Lillica Town before, but...
I suppose it's kinda exciting to see it: I suppose it's kinda exciting to see it up close instead of on TV.
WYNN: Right?! All the more reason to hur: WYNN: Right?! All the more reason to hurry it up, don't you think?
If you wanna go and sightsee a little bi: If you wanna go and sightsee a little bit, go ahead but don't keep me waiting for too long!
We're supposed to make our choices at th: We're supposed to make our choices at the same time, so it might be smart to head to the laboratory ASAP.
SABER: I could check with the locals, or: SABER: I could check with the locals, or I could head straight to the laboratory... Well, either way, let's get going.
Igglybuff and I are going to be the best: Igglybuff and I are going to be the best of partners and sweep the gym challenge!
I mean, we're an irresistably cute duo. The leaders will just melt from seeing us and hand us the win, right?
Most people who don't live in this town: Most people who don't live in this town are amazed by Eileen visiting when the league starts... But she visits every year!
I grew up here, so I know that before sh: I grew up here, so I know that before she does her live report, she visits the locals for tea and spends time with them.
She does it as a way to apologize for th: She does it as a way to apologize for the commotion she causes every time she's here.
It's pretty sweet, don't you think?: It's pretty sweet, don't you think?
A lot of trainers gather here at the sta: A lot of trainers gather here at the start of the season!
Mostly out of convenience due to this la: Mostly out of convenience due to this laboratory being closer to the first gym you have to challenge.
Lillica Town \"New beginnings amidst the: Lillica Town "New beginnings amidst the trees"
SABER: I don't have any business here.
There's a weird creepy old couple living: There's a weird creepy old couple living in the house right next to me.
All they ever do is chuckle at anyone wh: All they ever do is chuckle at anyone who enters their home... It freaks me out!
What the...? I can hear some faint chuck: What the...? I can hear some faint chuckling coming from inside.
Eugh, yikes. Gives me the creeps. Better: Eugh, yikes. Gives me the creeps. Better not go in there...
SABER: Maybe I shouldn't be poking my no: SABER: Maybe I shouldn't be poking my nose into other people's houses right now.
SABER: I don't have a reason or time to: SABER: I don't have a reason or time to go inside here.
SABER: As intriguing as other people's h: SABER: As intriguing as other people's houses are, I should probably just head to the lab sooner than later.
SABER: As quaint as the houses in this t: SABER: As quaint as the houses in this town are, I probably shouldn't keep Wynn waiting for too long...
You don't have a Pokémon, do you?: You don't have a Pokémon, do you?
I get you're excited to go to Celandine: I get you're excited to go to Celandine City, but Route 1 is beyond this point. It's a bad idea to head there without your starter.
The laboratory's north from here, so go: The laboratory's north from here, so go there first!
SABER: Uh, this is the direction I came: SABER: Uh, this is the direction I came from. I don't miss Plumere Village THAT much already that I want to go back home.
Hoho! I always sit here when a new seaso: Hoho! I always sit here when a new season of the league starts.
Seeing so many new trainers gathered in: Seeing so many new trainers gathered in one place is quite refreshing.
It makes me feel like I'm young again!: It makes me feel like I'm young again!
I'm no newbie trainer! I'm actually plen: I'm no newbie trainer! I'm actually plenty experienced. However, I'm not here to stay in Lillica Town.
In fact, I'm a geologist looking to docu: In fact, I'm a geologist looking to document more about Ivere's extremely varied ground structures, so I'm headed to Plumere Island.
Normally you're not allowed to get close: Normally you're not allowed to get close to the island's volcano, but I've got a special access permit for my research!
It's pretty exciting that I get to go hi: It's pretty exciting that I get to go hiking at a place for my job where not very many people are permitted to go!
The professor is in Celandine City right: The professor is in Celandine City right now, so her daughter seems to be handling the starter gifting at the moment.
You can tell it's not her usual job, tho: You can tell it's not her usual job, though. She fumbled her words a little bit at times, dropped her notepad...
She's trying, at least! I appreciated he: She's trying, at least! I appreciated her hospitability nonetheless.
SABER: Uh, I should probably head in thr: SABER: Uh, I should probably head in through the middle doors...
SABER: Well, here we go I suppose.
Let's hope that that feeling from earlie: Let's hope that that feeling from earlier was completely unwarranted.
SABER: Man, this place really IS big. Se: SABER: Man, this place really IS big. Seeing it in person really is different from seeing it on a TV screen.
I kinda wonder how this old manor ended: I kinda wonder how this old manor ended up as a laboratory to begin wi--
SABER: What the hell...? What was...
Why does this place make me feel like so: Why does this place make me feel like something's horribly off now that I'm actually here?
SABER: ...Nah, there's no way. So many p: SABER: ...Nah, there's no way. So many people visit this place, I'm sure it's fine.
It's gotta be the nerves or something.
Come on, Saber. Get it together!: Come on, Saber. Get it together!
Route 1 wasn't very long, but there were: Route 1 wasn't very long, but there were some trainers. The real challenge was going to be Lillidine Forest.
It's a pleasant forest that's normally a: It's a pleasant forest that's normally a shortcut between Lillica Town and Celandine City.
However, the storm that passed over Iver: However, the storm that passed over Ivere a few days ago toppled some trees in the forest, making the normal path hard to travel.
Unfortunately for me, that meant a detou: Unfortunately for me, that meant a detour through the denser parts of the forest.
The forest is quite big when you don't t: The forest is quite big when you don't take the road more traveled. Sigh...
It took me an overnight stay and some mo: It took me an overnight stay and some more to get through this place.
I'll admit... I got lost.\\| Thrice over: I'll admit... I got lost.\| Thrice over. I-I'm not so great at navigating forests, it seems.
Though in terms of encounters, I had sur: Though in terms of encounters, I had surprisingly little trouble.
I was expecting to come across more Poké: I was expecting to come across more Pokémon, but the trek through the tall grass was pretty uneventful.
While it was a bit odd, I decided to kee: While it was a bit odd, I decided to keep on moving to Route 2.
Celandine City is only a short walk away: Celandine City is only a short walk away now, as well as my goal.
Celandine City, Ivere's booming heart of: Celandine City, Ivere's booming heart of business.
And the Ivere League... \\| Here I come!: And the Ivere League... \| Here I come!
Where did one of my Poké Balls go?: Where did one of my Poké Balls go?
Oh no, oh no... Hey! C-Come back here, p: Oh no, oh no... Hey! C-Come back here, please?!
SABER: That girl looked familiar... Was: SABER: That girl looked familiar... Was that Adelinde?!
That can't be good. If she's heading tha: That can't be good. If she's heading that same direction, something must've happened!
SABER: Were you following a guy with pur: SABER: Were you following a guy with purple attire just now?
ADELINDE: Yes! He went in this building,: ADELINDE: Yes! He went in this building, actually. The door's still unlocked, b-but...
Well, I'm not actually supposed to be he: Well, I'm not actually supposed to be here.
SABER: Huh? What do you mean?: SABER: Huh? What do you mean?
ADELINDE: M-My mother said she needed to: ADELINDE: M-My mother said she needed to be in the city for her research after we were done handing out starters.
She said I was allowed to stay in the ci: She said I was allowed to stay in the city, but not go to areas without any people in them.
I shouldn't be straying from the city fo: I shouldn't be straying from the city for that reason. And Route 4 is particularly empty...

SABER: Seriously? One more victim before: SABER: Seriously? One more victim before retreating. What a rat.
Well, you're in luck, because I was task: Well, you're in luck, because I was tasked with tracking down that guy's hideout.
If he went in here, then it's likely tha: If he went in here, then it's likely that there'll be an entrance in this little shack.
Wanna tag along and get your Pokémon bac: Wanna tag along and get your Pokémon back?
